name: Missed work 2 weeks from fumes, what benefits?

mainEntity.name: Missed work 2 weeks from fumes, what benefits?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Temporary total disability: 2/3 wages during recovery.**

Plus medical; starts after waiting period (3-7 days)[2][3].

- Pay stubs prove wage.
- Doctor off-work note.
- Retroactive if prolonged.

File claim; get paid promptly. Covers losses[2].
